title: ICSI CSEET June 2026: Answer Book Inspection & Certified Copies Window Opens!
content:
# ICSI CSEET June 2026: Answer Book Inspection & Certified Copies Window Opens!

Ek important update hai Company Secretary Executive Entrance Test (CSEET) June 2026 session ke candidates ke liye. ICSI ne Answer Book Inspection aur Certified Copies apply karne ki window open kar di hai.

*   **Application Window:** Candidates 16th July 2026 se 14th August 2026 tak apni answer books inspect karne ya unki certified copies ke liye apply kar sakte hain.
*   **Application Mode:** Ye applications exclusively ICSI ke online SMASH Portal ke through hi accept ki jaengi.
*   **Fees Structure:**
    *   Answer Book Inspection ke liye fees Rs. 450/- per subject hai.
    *   Certified Copies provide karwane ke liye fees Rs. 500/- per subject hai.
    *   Ek baar pay ki gayi fees kisi bhi circumstance mein refund nahi hogi.
*   **Important Point:** Inspection of Answer Books ke liye candidates ko ICSI Noida Office (C-37, Sector-62, Institutional Area, Gautam Budh Nagar, Noida 201309) personally visit karna hoga.

Candidates ko salah di jaati hai ki woh last date ka wait na karein aur jald se jald apply kar dein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icsi.edu/media/webmodules/15072026_Attention_Students_CSEET_June2026_Inspection_Certified_Copies.pdf)

*Published on: 16 July 2026*
